auth.services_description: Kyan Library offers a range of distinguished services to provide our customers with a comfortable shopping experience, such as fast delivery service to all regions, with the ability to easily track orders, as well as flexible return and exchange options to ensure customer satisfaction. In addition, customers can benefit from shipping and packaging services for electronic occasions and pre-booking services for books and new releases, as well as the site provides loyalty tracking for users to collect points and benefit from exclusive discounts and offers.
auth.features_description: Kyan Library offers an easy and smooth shopping experience that allows users to browse a wide range of products from books and electronics to office supplies and educational games, which helps them quickly find products, with clear classifications and book lists according to new releases. It also allows users to access exclusive offers and discounts, in addition to secure and multiple payment options that suit everyone.

Our methodology is based on three pillar: Our methodology is based on three pillars: quality, sustainability, and innovation
methodology_content:
Hemma Real Estate operates with a clear strategic vision aimed at delivering real value in the Saudi real estate market by building an integrated marketing experience that highlights the quality of real estate products and helps clients make accurate and confident decisions.

Thanks to God, the company has earned wide trust from its clients, reflected in more than 400 positive reviews with an average rating of 4.9 out of 5 as of May 2025.

Hemma focuses on showcasing all real estate products — residential units and projects including apartments, villas, lands, townhouses, and penthouses — in a way that reflects their true advantages and meets the aspirations of clients, whether for premium living or long-term investment.

Work Principles

Hemma is guided by a set of principles that shape its operations and define its relationships with clients and partners:

  • Complete transparency in every interaction
  • High accuracy in execution standards
  • Continuous innovation in marketing methods
  • Ensuring customer satisfaction at every stage of the sales process

Our Services

Hemma Real Estate offers comprehensive real estate services, including:

  • Marketing and selling all types of real estate products (commercial and residential units: apartments, villas, townhouses, lands)
  • Marketing off-plan developments
  • Providing specialized real estate consultations for developers and investors
  • Delivering highly accurate feasibility studies and realistic pricing for real estate developers

Who We Serve

  • Individuals seeking a residential property or investment opportunity
  • Investors and companies looking to develop real estate projects
  • Real estate developers seeking a reliable marketing partner

What Sets Hemma Apart

  • Selecting strategic locations in the Central, Western, and Eastern regions
  • A modern marketing infrastructure relying on advanced digital tools
  • Consultants with more than 18 years of experience in the Saudi market
  • Tailored, highly accurate marketing plans for each project
  • Competitive pricing and flexible payment options
  • Operations built on high standards and data-driven methodologies

Success Stories

Hemma has contributed to marketing prominent projects in Riyadh, Jeddah, Madinah, Dammam, and Khobar, in addition to distinctive off-plan developments, achieving high sales rates in short periods — thanks first to God, and then to the integration of its marketing and consulting teams.

Key Achievements of 2024

Hemma recorded sales exceeding 1.5 billion SAR during 2024 by relying on:

  • Specialized consulting expertise
  • Precise digital marketing tools
  • Tailored marketing plans designed for each project’s needs

Company Overview

  • Founded: 2020
  • Headquarters: Al-Malqa District, Riyadh
  • Employees: Over 280 team members
  • Specialties: Residential and commercial real estate marketing, off-plan projects, developer consulting

Our Team

Hemma is led by a team of real estate experts, consultants, and digital marketing specialists, with more than 18 years of experience in the Saudi real estate sector.
The company believes that competence is the foundation of trust and long-term partnerships.

Our Future Direction

Hemma aims to expand its presence in the Saudi market by:

  • Strengthening its digital footprint
  • Establishing strategic partnerships with local developers
  • Adopting more innovative and effective marketing solutions

Client Testimonials

  • “Professional service and clear results in a short time.”
  • “A precise marketing plan and evident expertise from the very first visit.”
  • “Their partnership was a key factor in the project’s success.”

Contact Us

Whether you’re looking for an apartment, villa, floor unit, land, townhouse, or penthouse in Riyadh, Jeddah, Madinah, Makkah, Dammam, or Khobar — or you’re a developer seeking a strong and well-studied marketing partner — Hemma Real Estate is your ideal choice.
privacy_policy_description: We are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring your personal information is handled securely.
privacy_policy_content:
First: Introduction

The term Privacy Policy refers to the method by which the Hemma Platform collects data and protects the personal information of its users. This policy is of utmost importance.

The terms used in this Privacy Policy are defined as follows:

  • The Platform, Hemma Platform, or Hemma: Refers to the electronic platform owned by Hemma Real Estate Company, accessible through the website, Android applications, iPhone applications, or any other electronic applications or websites.
  • The term platform does not refer to any specific individual’s personal information. Instead, personal information is collected from individuals who wish to use the platform through various means such as browsing, contacting customer service via phone or email, and other methods. By providing your personal information to the platform, you authorize it to process this information in accordance with the terms and conditions of the Privacy Policy.

The terms of this Privacy Policy may be modified, in whole or in part, at any time. The modified version will be published on the platform and will become effective seven days after its publication. By continuing to use the platform after such publication, you agree to the terms and conditions in the modified version and acknowledge the changes made regarding your personal data that you had previously provided to us.

By using the platform, you agree to the terms of the Privacy Policy, which is legally binding. If new features or tools are added to our services, they will also be subject to this policy.

We will store your personal information, use it, and disclose it in accordance with applicable laws, regulations, and customs, and as outlined in the platform’s Privacy Policy. Your consent will always be requested before using your personal information for purposes other than those described in the Privacy Policy.

Second: User Information

We collect the following information from users:

  • Personal Information: Your name, ID number or commercial registration number, tax number, address, email, mobile number, and any additional information that we may require.
  • Device Data: Files on your device, including photos or other data you allow us to access.
  • Content Information: Information you publish on the platform, which is required to verify your identity, contact you, and enable you to use the platform’s services and features.

We also collect data from web pages hosted by the platform that users visit, as well as browsing behavior, device information, browser type, network connection, and IP address. This information is used to improve and enhance your experience with us.

Users grant the platform access to their camera, photo library, and location to fully utilize the platform’s services. By using the platform, you authorize us to access your location via your device’s mapping service to provide optimal service.

We collect data related to the services offered and performance measurements, including user activity and interactions on the platform.

When the platform is installed, we collect device-specific information, including device type, operating system, browser information, IP address, mobile network details, and device identifiers. If location access is permitted, location data is also collected.

Third: Visitor and Support User Information

When you install the platform, we collect the following:

  • Personal Information: Name, email, device details, operating system, browser type, network connection, IP address, mobile network details, and device identifiers.
  • Location Data: If granted access.

We may also collect personal information submitted through support requests or other inquiries to the platform, including chat conversations and phone support interactions, for performance evaluation and quality improvement.

Additional data such as reviews, comments, and other content shared on the platform may be collected and used for personalized marketing, either directly or in collaboration with third parties. By agreeing to this policy, users grant permission to use their personal data for marketing, development, or other purposes determined by the platform or its owning company.

Fourth: Cookies and Tracking Technologies

Cookies are sent to your browser from the platform and stored on your device. Each device accessing the platform is assigned a unique cookie.

Cookies are used to:

  • Identify your device.
  • Provide personalized services.
  • Display advertisements from Google and other third-party services.
terms_conditions_description: Please read these terms and conditions carefully before using our platform.
terms_conditions_content:
Welcome to Hemma Real Estate Services Platform
By using this website, you agree to abide by the following terms and conditions governing your use of the platform. If you do not agree with any of these terms, please refrain from using the site.

1. Eligibility

  • Users must provide accurate and truthful information when registering or using the platform’s services.

2. Usage

  • The platform may not be used for any unlawful or unethical purposes.
  • Users agree not to upload or publish any content that violates intellectual property rights or causes harm to others.
  • Unauthorized access to any part of the site or its servers is strictly prohibited.

3. Registration and Accounts

  • Users are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their login credentials.
  • The platform reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts in case of violation of terms or provision of false information.

4. Privacy

  • All personal data will be handled according to the platform’s privacy policy.

5. Services

  • Hemma offers a variety of real estate services, including property listings, brokerage, and property searches.
  • Services may evolve, and new features may be added at the company’s discretion.

6. Fees and Payments

  • Certain services are subject to fees, which are specified and payable as per the platform’s guidelines.
  • Failure to complete payment may result in service suspension or cancellation.

7. Intellectual Property

  • All intellectual property rights related to the website, including texts, images, and logos, belong to Hemma and may not be used without prior permission.

8. Liability Limitation

  • The platform is not liable for any damages resulting from the use of its services, including lost profits or data.
  • The platform is not responsible for the accuracy of listings posted by users.

9. Termination

  • The platform reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts or services for any reason without prior notice.

10. Governing Law

  • These terms and conditions are governed by the laws of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, and disputes will be resolved in Saudi courts.
